issue.title: @gitclaw /prompt compression e2e 20260531T081454Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /prompt compression @file:docs/search-fixture.md:1-1

Live prompt-compression E2E.
Use the repo-reader skill and search for prompt compression unique search fixture phrase, but the deterministic prompt compression report must stay body-free.
Do not include this hidden issue token: GITCLAW_PROMPT_COMPRESSION_HIDDEN_20260531T081454Z
issue.author: AnandChowdhary
